creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-07-19 15:30:03 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    x11-clocks           Makefile 
  Added files:
    x11-clocks/alarm-clock Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Alarm Clock is the personal alarm clock for GNOME desktop environment. It
  supports sound fading, passive and normal dialogs, full screen dialogs,
  scheduling options command line running and few standard actions. It has an
  intuitive interface and it can be translated to any language.
  
  WWW:    http://alarm-clock.54.pl/
  
  PR:             ports/125456
  Submitted by:   Romain TartiÃ¨re <romain at blogreen.org>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.60      +1 -0      ports/x11-clocks/Makefile
  1.1       +24 -0     ports/x11-clocks/alarm-clock/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/x11-clocks/alarm-clock/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/x11-clocks/alarm-clock/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +74 -0     ports/x11-clocks/alarm-clock/pkg-plist (new)
